calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Off Calendar

Petn. For Accountings & Reports Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearences by B.K. Childress, atty. for petitioner, C. T. Course petitioner
Tenative ruling, accounting granted and set aside petition denied.
Judge:Dorothy McMath, Clerk:Larrisa Dotson, Rptr:Christina Paxton, Baliff:Mizota

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2006 Written Order Received

Petn. For Accountings & Reports Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Continued To Jul-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Berg appearing for petitioner. Kyle Childress appearing for and with Mr. Corse, trustee. Mr. Childress has the accounting but it is not in filing form. He will file it with a report in two days. Mr. Berg raises the removal issue. Matter is continued to 7/31 for hearing on the accounting. By 7/3, Mr. Berg is to file an amended pleading that specify the basis for removal. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Accountings & Reports Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-20-2006 Continued To Jun-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Berg appearing for petitioner. Kyle Childress appearing for trustee. The trustee is on a world cruise until 5/5. Mr. Childress wants to request a continuance. Court is granting the petition in part to order an accounting for 2004 and 2005 and response to this petition to be filed by 6/19. Order re accounting signed. Matter is continued to 6/19. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward CSR#11918. Clerk: Ella Yip.
